feat.critical_failure: As failure, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC against the triggering attack.
feat.failure: The opponent targets you with the triggering  attack instead.
feat.name: Standard-Bearer's Sacrifice
feat.requirement: You are holding or wielding your banner.
feat.success: The opponent completes its attack against your ally.
feat.text: Seeing an enemy take aim at your ally, you bravely flourish your banner to redirect their attention to you. The triggering opponent must attempt a Will save against your class DC.

traits.name: Brandish
traits.text: The brandish trait indicates an ability that involves you waving or otherwise actively displaying your banner. To use an ability that has the brandish trait, you must be holding your banner in one hand or wielding a weapon it is attached to. Since you have to be actively signaling with your banner to direct your squadmates while using a tactic with the brandish trait, you cannot use free actions or reactions granted as part of a brandish tactic unless specifically noted otherwise.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Visual
traits.text: A visual effect can affect only creatures that can see it. This applies only to visible parts of the effect, as determined by the GM.

feat.trigger: An opponent targets an ally with a ranged attack, you are observing both of them, and you are also in range of the attack.
